generator.name: populate_td_rifki2020
generator.source: Rifki2020 sigma=100 l=12 raw matrices + legacy TDVRPTW-benchmarks attribute harvest

metadata.notes: Real Lyon road-network stepwise travel times (Rifki et al. 2020, sigma=100, 60 steps of 720 s) made FIFO by the arrival-time lower envelope (exact MD92 transformation); upward jumps are genuine vertical steps of the arrival-time functions. K=60 is the canonical granularity (chosen over K=120 for halved breakpoint counts in the same weight class as the other TD families; see the family README). Time windows, service times, demands, capacity and fleet size are the values generated once by Onyr's legacy TDVRPTW-benchmarks pipeline (the original [RCS20] time-window files are deliberately not used); coordinates are a deterministic stress-layout embedding of the time-averaged travel times.
